{
  "judge_id": "JG-007",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.1": 4, "R1.2": 5, "RX.1": 5, "RX.3": 5, "RX.4": 5, "RX.5": 5},
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The summary accurately captures the key issues without restating surface phrasing.",
    "R1.2": "Identifies multiple logical inconsistencies and provides detailed fixes for each issue.",
    "RX.1": "Discloses uncertainty about the strong-convexity claim, citing potential errors in the analysis.",
    "RX.3": "Covers exactly the agreed J*(d) without any drift.",
    "RX.4": "Avoids introducing new errors or harmful content; all feedback is constructive and relevant.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing clear traceability."
  },
  "confidence": {

    "R1.2": 0.85,
    "RX.1": 0.75,

rationale.R1.1: The summary accurately captures the key issues without restating surface phrasing.
rationale.R1.2: Identifies multiple logical inconsistencies and provides detailed fixes for each issue.
rationale.RX.1: Discloses uncertainty about the strong-convexity claim, citing potential errors in the analysis.
rationale.RX.3: Covers exactly the agreed J*(d) without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: Avoids introducing new errors or harmful content; all feedback is constructive and relevant.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing clear traceability.
